title: How to Play ZXSnake
seoTitle: How to Play ZXSnake | BarkinMad Studios
description: Understand the ZXSnake objective, score structure, and game flow from launch to end-of-run decisions.
summary: The goal is survival, growth, and score progression in a fast arcade environment.
sourceNotes: Flow and score wording reflects current published gameplay systems in the app listing.
Exact scoring modifiers are to verify against in-game telemetry.

sections.heading: Objective
paragraphs: Avoid collisions, collect what is available, and build longer runs for better score opportunities.
The best sessions are short and repeatable, with small quality improvements carried into the next run.

sections.heading: Game flow
paragraphs: A session starts from setup, moves into active movement, and finishes by completion event or collision.
Use score progress, timing, and lane awareness to maintain consistency over repeated sessions.
bullets: Prioritise clean movement and timing before increasing tempo
Review score outcome and choose a small improvement target next session

sections.heading: Progression loop
paragraphs: Score and match quality are the two practical signals for progress.
Use progression systems and leaderboards as checkpoints rather than single-session goals.
